prompt: Luxury fashion advertisement, vertical editorial product ad shot at golden hour on a high-rise balcony overlooking a modern city skyline at sunset. A stylish woman stands in a confident three-quarter pose, framed from mid-thigh up, with her face obscured by a simple rectangular block matching warm brown-orange tones. She has long, softly wavy brunette hair lit by warm backlight from the setting sun. She wears a black tailored blazer over a fitted white scoop-neck ribbed top and high-waisted light beige trousers, with one hand in her pocket and the other holding a structured taupe leather handbag with a top handle, flap closure, polished gold clasp hardware, and a hanging leather tag. The bag is the visual hero and should look premium, elegant, and sharply detailed. Use cinematic warm lighting, soft rim light on the hair, subtle luxury color grading, shallow depth of field, and blurred skyscrapers in the background. Compose the layout like a premium brand campaign with large text and icons on the left side. At top left, place a refined serif monogram logo: {argument name="brand monogram" default="L"}. Below it, large white serif headline text stacked in uppercase: {argument name="headline text" default="CARRY CONFIDENCE. EVERYDAY."}. Beneath that, add a short white serif body copy in 4 lines: {argument name="body text" default="Timeless design. Effortless elegance. Made for every moment that moves you forward."}. Add exactly 3 circular line icons with labels arranged vertically: premium leather, timeless design, made to last. At the bottom left, place the brand name in large elegant serif capitals: {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"}, with smaller uppercase tagline below: {argument name="tagline" default="BAGS THAT DEFINE YOU."}. Add a bordered call-to-action button reading “SHOP THE COLLECTION” with a small right arrow. Overall style: upscale, aspirational, polished e-commerce campaign, photorealistic fashion ad, luxurious but modern, clean typography, balanced negative space, magazine-quality composition.
translatedPrompt: 奢华时尚广告，竖版编辑风格产品大片，拍摄于黄金时刻，背景为俯瞰现代城市天际线的摩天大楼阳台，正值日落时分。一位时尚女性以自信的三分之二侧身姿态站立，取景范围从大腿中部向上，其面部被一个与暖棕橙色调相呼应的简约矩形色块遮挡。她留着长长的深棕色微卷发，在落日的暖色背光下熠熠生辉。她身穿黑色修身西装外套，内搭白色圆领罗纹紧身背心，下着高腰浅米色长裤，一只手插在口袋里，另一只手拎着一款质感挺括的灰褐色皮革手袋，手袋配有顶部手柄、翻盖设计、精致的金色锁扣五金件以及悬挂式皮革吊牌。手袋是视觉焦点，需呈现出高端、优雅且细节清晰的质感。采用电影级暖色调灯光，发丝处带有柔和的轮廓光，运用细腻的奢华色彩分级，浅景深效果，背景中的摩天大楼呈现虚化处理。布局参考高端品牌广告，左侧排布大号文字与图标。左上角放置精致的衬线体字母组合 Logo：{argument name="brand monogram" default="L"}。下方为大号白色衬线体大写标题：{argument name="headline text" default="CARRY CONFIDENCE. EVERYDAY."}。标题下方添加 4 行简短的白色衬线体正文：{argument name="body text" default="Timeless design. Effortless elegance. Made for every moment that moves you forward."}。垂直排列 3 个带有标签的圆形线条图标：优质皮革、永恒设计、经久耐用。左下角放置大号优雅衬线体大写品牌名称：{argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"}，下方配以较小的全大写标语：{argument name="tagline" default="BAGS THAT DEFINE YOU."}。添加一个带有边框的“立即选购” (SHOP THE COLLECTION) 行动号召按钮，并配有一个向右的小箭头。整体风格：高端、令人向往、精致的电商广告、照片级真实感的时尚大片、奢华且现代、排版整洁、负空间平衡、杂志级构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华手袋日落广告：此提示词可生成精美的竖版奢华时尚手袋广告，非常适合电商推广及社交媒体广告投放。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, backlight, golden hour, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
